conversaciones.locacionDescripcion: You are in a cloud forest trail

dialogos.texto: Hello! I am a birdwatcher looking for the Resplendent Quetzal. Do you know what this beautiful bird mainly eats?

opciones.texto: It mainly eats wild avocados and small insects.
opciones.respuesta: Exactly! The 'aguacatillo' is its favorite food in the cloud forest.

opciones.texto: It eats only fish from the rivers.
opciones.respuesta: Not quite! Quetzals live high in the trees, not near rivers.

opciones.texto: It eats coconuts from the beach.
opciones.respuesta: That's wrong. Coconuts grow on beaches, but quetzals live in cold mountains!

conversaciones.locacionDescripcion: You are on a beautiful beach in Guanacaste

dialogos.texto: Hi! I love the beaches in Guanacaste. I heard leatherback turtles nest here. When do they usually come?

opciones.texto: They nest at night, on the same beach they were born.
opciones.respuesta: That's right! Leatherback turtles are amazing navigators.

opciones.texto: They nest during the hottest time of the day to get a tan.
opciones.respuesta: Haha, no! The hot sand would be dangerous for their eggs.

opciones.texto: They only nest high in the mountains.
opciones.respuesta: Turtles are marine animals, they nest on sandy beaches, not mountains!

conversaciones.locacionDescripcion: You see a sloth hanging from a tree

dialogos.texto: Oh my goodness! Look at that sloth! I know they are very slow, but do they have any hidden skills?

opciones.texto: Yes! Surprisingly, they are excellent swimmers.
opciones.respuesta: Wow, I didn't know that! They drop into rivers to move faster.

opciones.texto: Yes, they can run very fast when scared.
opciones.respuesta: Actually, their muscles don't allow them to run at all.

opciones.texto: Yes, they can fly short distances.

conversaciones.locacionDescripcion: You are at the Arenal Volcano observation deck

dialogos.texto: Greetings! I am studying the Arenal Volcano. Can you tell me what kind of energy Costa Rica produces using volcanoes?

opciones.texto: Costa Rica uses geothermal energy from volcanoes.
opciones.respuesta: Correct! It's a clean, renewable energy source used nationwide.

opciones.texto: They use volcanoes to cook giant pizzas.
opciones.respuesta: Well, that sounds delicious, but it's not how they generate electricity.

opciones.texto: They throw trash into the volcano to destroy it.
opciones.respuesta: Absolutely not! Costa Rica protects its environment.

conversaciones.locacionDescripcion: You are at the historic Mercado Central

dialogos.texto: I love this market! What is the most famous traditional breakfast dish of Costa Rica?

opciones.texto: The most famous breakfast is Gallo Pinto, made with rice and beans.
opciones.respuesta: Yes! Gallo Pinto is delicious, especially with Lizano sauce.

opciones.texto: The most famous dish is hamburgers.
opciones.respuesta: Hamburgers are popular globally, but the traditional Costa Rican dish is Gallo Pinto!

opciones.texto: The most famous dish is sushi.
opciones.respuesta: Sushi is Japanese! The traditional Costa Rican breakfast is Gallo Pinto.
